What entities are present on the countertop and what is the woman doing behind them?
canonical_answer: A woman with reddish-brown hair wears a white shirt and patterned apron while standing behind a dark granite countertop. A green and white coconut milk carton sits next to a glass measuring cup filled with white liquid. An empty clear blender pitcher rests on the counter near the cup. White kitchen cabinets and a stainless steel refrigerator stand in the background.
